---
applyTo: "scripts/build_villager_engineers_map.ps1,references/indexes/villager-engineers-map.*"
---
Use build_villager_engineers_map.ps1 for requests mentioning squad_engineers_ext, villager build lists, or sbps/races villager construction mapping.
Prefer direct RGD decode when rgd-decode is available; otherwise use canonical producedBy=villager fallback and label the source as indirect.
